## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEO initiatives and collaboration opportunities between Ramp and GrowthX Labs](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shaun presented multiple SEO projects at Ramp, including vendor alternatives, templates, procurement, and accounting software initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs showcased their programmatic SEO capabilities and AI-driven workflows for content creation and backlink acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in collaborating on vendor alternatives and financial templates projects as priority initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)

## Topics

### Ramp's SEO Initiatives

  - [Vendor alternatives: Leveraging proprietary spend data to create high-value content on top alternatives for various software products](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Templates: Creating financial templates as a CRO initiative and to test the value of dedicated CRO resources](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Procurement: Recently launched pillar, focusing on traffic that converts and scales](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Accounting software for X: Targeting long-tail keywords for specific industries and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Accountant directory: Subdomain project in need of improvement, currently at stage 3 of 10 in development](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Capabilities

  - [Programmatic SEO experience with creating thousands of pages for various industries](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [AI-driven workflows for content creation, data enrichment, and personalized outreach](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Backlink acquisition strategies using AI to identify potential partners and generate personalized pitches](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Experience with implementing SEO strategies on various platforms, including Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

### Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Prioritize vendor alternatives project using Ramp's proprietary spend data](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Explore financial templates as a CRO initiative](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Potential for GrowthX Labs to take on large-scale content creation (2000+ pages) for Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Integrate GrowthX Labs' AI workflows and programmatic SEO capabilities into Ramp's existing projects](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

### SEO Measurement and Success Metrics

  - [Discussion on how Ramp measures SEO success beyond traditional metrics like clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [Opportunity to explore additional success metrics and KPIs for SEO initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Shaun to initiate process for integrating vendor alternatives and templates projects with GrowthX Labs](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
  - [Formal introduction between Shaun and Marcel (from GrowthX Labs) to discuss engagement details](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs to provide suggestions and ideas based on the shared project document](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Shaun to be invited to weekly GrowthX Labs meetings for brainstorming and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Further discussions on specific project scopes, timelines, and costs to be scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/4LHaHK-A1JEz9mfB_MKfvuZ3sJRwbCVR?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
